use_cases: Landing page hero sections with animated atmospheric backgrounds
Product launch or feature announcement pages requiring visual impact
Portfolio or showcase websites needing ambient animated effects
SaaS dashboards with premium-looking hero sections
Creative agency sites seeking ethereal visual storytelling
ai_summary: Aurora-themed hero section featuring 60 animated light beams that rise, fade, and drop in continuous loops, creating an ethereal digital aurora effect. Built with CSS keyframe animations and randomized timing for each beam to produce organic, flowing motion. Designed as a visually striking entry section for landing pages and product showcases, offering a premium, atmospheric aesthetic suitable for tech and creative industries.
